widgets.title: A/B Test Container
widgets.description: Generic A/B test widget. Randomly shows Variant A or Variant B to each visitor, with full independent content per variant and console-only tracking events.

properties.name: experiment_name
properties.label: Experiment Name
properties.description: Short identifier used in console tracking events (e.g., 'homepage_hero_q2').

properties.name: split_percent_a
properties.label: % Traffic to Variant A
properties.description: Whole number 0–100. The remainder goes to Variant B. Default 50 = 50/50.

properties.name: persist_assignment
properties.label: Persist Assignment
properties.description: How long a visitor stays in their assigned variant: 'session' (until tab closes), 'permanent' (across visits), or 'none' (re-assign every render).

properties.name: force_variant
properties.label: Force Variant (debug)
properties.description: For testing only. Set to 'a' or 'b' to override assignment. Leave blank for normal split.

properties.name: show_debug_badge
properties.label: Show Variant Badge
properties.description: Set to 'true' to show a small 'Variant A' / 'Variant B' tag in the corner (useful in staging). Leave blank or 'false' in production.

properties.name: a_subtitle
properties.label: Variant A — Subtitle
properties.defaultValue: This is the original version of the message.

properties.name: a_cta_label
properties.label: Variant A — CTA Label
properties.description: Leave blank to hide the button.

properties.name: b_subtitle
properties.label: Variant B — Subtitle
properties.defaultValue: This is the alternative version of the message.

properties.name: b_cta_label
properties.label: Variant B — CTA Label
properties.description: Leave blank to hide the button.

defaultConfig.a_subtitle: This is the original version of the message.
defaultConfig.b_subtitle: This is the alternative version of the message.

widgets.title: Sam Sky
widgets.description: A welcome card for Sky Community Superusers — animated sky scene with a Superuser badge, recognition message, and optional CTA.

properties.name: badge_text
properties.label: Badge
properties.description: Pill label shown above the heading. Try 'SUPERUSER' or 'SUPERUSER+'.

properties.name: greeting_title
properties.label: Heading
properties.description: Main heading over the sky scene.
properties.defaultValue: Welcome to the Sky Superusers Lounge

properties.name: greeting_subtitle
properties.label: Subtext
properties.description: Recognition message shown below the heading.
properties.defaultValue: Thank you for sharing your knowledge and supporting fellow members of the Sky Community.

properties.name: cta_label
properties.label: CTA Label
properties.description: Button text. Leave blank to hide the button.

properties.name: cta_url
properties.label: CTA URL
properties.description: Where the button links to. Leave blank to hide the button.

properties.name: sky_mode
properties.label: Sky Mode
properties.description: Either 'day' or 'night' — controls the gradient and accent color.

defaultConfig.greeting_title: Welcome to the Sky Superusers Lounge
defaultConfig.greeting_subtitle: Thank you for sharing your knowledge and supporting fellow members of the Sky Community.

stylesheets.name: theme
